info.name: Three-Way Match Engine
info.description:
API collection for the Three-Way Match Engine. Supports PO, GRN, and Invoice document upload, retrieval, and matching.

Use 'Upload Document (JSON Bypass)' when Gemini API quota is unavailable.

formdata.description: The PO, GRN, or Invoice file (PDF or image)
Must be: po, grn, or invoice

request.description: Upload a document file. Gemini parses it into structured JSON and stores it in MongoDB.

Bypasses Gemini entirely. POST pre-parsed JSON directly to seed data for testing or demos. Useful when Gemini API quota is exhausted.

Change documentType to 'grn' or 'invoice' and adjust the data body accordingly.

variable.description: MongoDB _id returned from the upload response

request.description: Retrieve a stored parsed document by its MongoDB _id.

variable.description: The PO number to match across PO, GRN, and Invoice documents

request.description: Returns the current three-way match status for a given PO number, including linked document summaries, match status, and violation reasons.
